creator: dl@leo.org
text:
Hi David,

David W. Chapman Jr. wrote on Wed, Jun 13, 2001 at 10:31:35AM -0500:
> The linux version is working, there isn't a 4.77 of the native 
> version because netscape hasn't produced one.

Yes, I know that, and I've mentioned to use the linux-version as
a workaround.

My intention was, that maybe a previous version of netscape 4
is stable and bug-free enough to be used as a native version.
e.g. something like 4.61 ?

For me, I cannot use the linux-version, since the linux_base port
seems to be broken, too. (I've submitted a corresponding PR).

Sorry I don't mean to get on anybody's nerves by sending 
problem reports, but as soon as I tell anybody about a problem,
the first thing, people ask me, if I've sent a pr, so that the issue
may be solved. I've got quite some years of experience now with FreeBSD,
so I assume, it's not a problem with my system/setup/environment, since
I've checked that. But of cource, I could be wrong.

Best regards,
 Daniel
